name: workiq-sales-copilot
description: WorkIQ Sales Copilot — always-on-top floating desktop assistant for live Teams sales calls.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n widget,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:widget" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @workiq/floating-widget && npm run build -w @workiq/desktop-client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @workiq/floating-widget && npm run typecheck -w @workiq/desktop-client
